rationale: Review 2 directly identifies the core placement problem: the file lives under AlgebraicGroup/ but contains only generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra code (no Spec, GrpObj, or AffineScheme types appear anywhere in the diff), so the directory name misrepresents the content. Review 1's findings are real but neither is primarily about placement — the missing-import issue is an integration/connectivity concern and cannot be confirmed from the diff alone.
